calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Approving Compensation Of Trustee Mikhail Gishizky
Off Calendar Feb-07-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Matter called with case number PTR-09-292421 The Olga Gishizky Irrevocable Trust.

Appearances: Daniel Conrad and Robin Rudderow for and with Olga Gishizky. Avid Alavi for Elizabeth Adler (Successor Trustee). Douglas Voorsanger for Mikhail Gishizky.

The Court granted the Petition for Approval of Settlement Agreement and Termination of Trust (subject to review of the order). The other four petitions were taken off calendar. Status for filing of final account in the Olga Gishizky Irrevocable Trust (PTR-09-292421) is set for April 17, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss.Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.

Petition To Compel Trustee To Account And Request For Surcharge
Off Calendar Feb-07-2012 Off Calendar

Petition For Order Approving Compensation Of Trustee Mikhail Gishizky
Off Calendar Dec-06-2011 Continued To Feb-07-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: This matter was heard with case number PTR-09-292421 The Olga Gishizky Family Irrevocable Trust.

Appearances: Daniel Conrad and Robin Rudderow for Olga Gishizky (Petitioner). Avid Alavi for Elizabeth Adler. Matthew Quint for Mikhail Gishizky.

All matters were continued to February 7, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Counsel to provide further argument/showing with regard to the issue of change in circumstances.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Petition To Compel Trustee To Account And Request For Surcharge
Off Calendar Jan-12-2011 Continued To May-10-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: This matter was called with case number PTR-09-292421 The Olga Gishizky Irrevocable Trust.

Appearances: Robin Rudderow for and with Olga Gishizky. Matthew Quint for Mikhail Gishizky.

Counsel stated that they had two sessions with the Mediator and two private sessions, that they have not come to a settlement yet, that they needed to respond to discovery and file additional pleadings, and reqeusted a four month continuance. Ms. Gishizky expressed her concerns. The matters were continued to May 10, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Petition To Compel Trustee To Account And Request For Surcharge
Off Calendar Dec-08-2010 Continued To Jan-12-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Compel Trustee To Account And Request For Surcharge
Off Calendar Oct-05-2010 Continued To Dec-08-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: This matter was called with case number PTR-09-292421 (The Olga Gishizky Irrevocable Trust).

Appearances: Doug Voorsanger for Mikhail Gishizky. Robin Rudderow for Olga Gishizky.

Ms. Rudderow stated that the parties were in the middle of mediation and that they would need time to complete the mediation. The Court continued both matters to December 8, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status on the mediation.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: none present.

Petition To Compel Trustee To Account And Request For Surcharge
Off Calendar Jun-29-2010 Continued To Oct-05-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: This matter was called with case number 292421 The Olga Gishizky Irrevocable Trust.

Appearances: Robin Rudderow and Elizabeth Hanowsky for and with Olga Gishizky. Douglas Voorsanger for and with Mikhail Gishizky.

Mr. Voorsanger stated that there was a $40,000.00 reserve remaining in the family trust, that there was a civil matter case number CGC-10-498919 filed with similar issues which appear to be overlapping with the probate pleadings and that he does not have the files from previous Counsel. Ms. Rudderow stated that they had no accounting with regard to the family trust, that they had no definitive list of the Parent's assets, no list of income and expenses, no list of allocations and that the Mother's estate had been closed in 2007. Counsel agreed to discuss the issues and participate in mediation. The matter was continued to October 5, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.

Petition To Compel Trustee To Account And Request For Surcharge
Off Calendar Jun-01-2010 Continued To Jun-29-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
